Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx

Class Flixel.Signals

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.Flixel.Signals
Enclosing class:
Flixel
public static final class Flixel.Signals extends Object
Contains all the global events that get dispatched when something happens in the game.

This includes anything from the screen being switched, the game updating every frame, and just about everything you can think of.

IMPORTANT DETAIL!: Anything with the pre and post prefixes always mean the same thing. If a signal has pre, then the signal gets ran BEFORE any functionality is executed, and post means AFTER all functionality was executed.
